commands.welcome:
Welcome to Kromic Gold Rate Bot! 📈

I'll send you daily gold rate updates. You can also check rates anytime using the commands below.
commands.start:
Welcome to Kromic Gold Rate Bot! 📈

I'll send you daily gold rate updates. You can also check rates anytime using the commands below.
commands.help:
📚 Available Commands

/currentrate - Get current gold rate
/lastonemonthrates - View last 30 days rates
/emailalerts - Subscribe to email alerts
/feedback - Send feedback to admin
/settings - Manage your notification settings
/pause - Pause Telegram notifications
/resume - Resume Telegram notifications
/unsubscribeemail - Unsubscribe from email alerts
/history - View historical rates by date
/help - Show this help message
commands.pause:
⏸️ Telegram notifications paused.

You won't receive rate updates until you resume. Use /resume to enable notifications again.
commands.resume:
▶️ Telegram notifications resumed.

You'll now receive daily gold rate updates.
commands.unsubscribeemail:
📧 Email subscription removed.

You won't receive email alerts anymore. Use /emailalerts to subscribe again.
commands.rate_unchanged: Gold rate unchanged for {Date}. Latest stored 22K rate: {Rate}.
commands.welcome_new: Welcome! Here's the Latest Gold Rate
commands.youll_receive_updates: You'll receive daily updates when the rate changes.
commands.no_data_30_days: No data available for the past 30 days.
commands.select_date: Please select a date to view the gold rate:
commands.rate_not_found: No gold rate data found for {Date}.
commands.emailalerts: Please enter your email address to subscribe to email alerts:
commands.feedback: Please send your feedback message. I'll forward it to the admin.
